code.text: Specimen information

text.div:
Specimen information

Test12-JAN-2023Specimen
Appearance of UrineCloudy urineUrine
Odor of UrineUrine smell ammoniacalUrine
Clarity of UrineTranslucentUrine
Color of UrineBrown colorUrine

Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows significantly elevated serum creatinine, indicating impaired renal function. Urinalysis reveals marked proteinuria, glucosuria, ketonuria, low specific gravity, and abnormal urine appearance (cloudy, brown, ammoniacal), all suggestive of nephrotic syndrome or advanced kidney disease. Blood glucose and HbA1c are not elevated, making diabetes unlikely. Recommend urgent nephrology evaluation for further assessment and management.
